nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 巴拉圭
nodes.summary: 巴拉圭是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联314种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、棕凤头䳍、白腹拟䳍等314种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Freckle-breasted thornbird
nodes.summary: Freckle-breasted thornbird（Freckle-breasted thornbird，学名 Phacellodomus striaticollis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 阿根廷
nodes.summary: 阿根廷是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联495种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、南山䳍等495种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The freckle-breasted thornbird (Phacellodomus striaticollis) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Uruguay, and possibly Paraguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The freckle-breasted thornbird (Phacellodomus striaticollis) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Uruguay, and possibly Paraguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The freckle-breasted thornbird is found in northern Argentina between the provinces of Formosa and Buenos Aires, in Brazil from Paraná state south, and in most of Uruguay. It possibly also occurs in Parguay; the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society has only sight records from that country and so treats it as hypothetical there. The species inhabits a variety of landscapes, almost always near water
